infra.droplet_size: n/a (container mem_limit=16g per openclaw agent; 4g for aggregator)
infra.topology: 4-node Docker bridge network (10.88.1.0/24) — 3 openclaw agent containers + 1 memory-only aggregator

notes: Tested on a local Docker mesh (3 openclaw agents + 1 memory-only aggregator on a single workstation). NOT a DigitalOcean campaign — no DO infrastructure was provisioned. See docs/local-docker-mesh.md for full reproducibility. Every byte of config, build recipe, harness, and scenario is committed in this repo.
scenario_policy_notes: S20 mtls_happy_path is mtls-only (it self-gates with 'only runs under tls_mode=mtls'). Appended only under tls_mode=mtls in this runner, matching ai-memory-ai2ai-gate PR #55. S21 mtls_anonymous_rejected is likewise mtls-only. S27 openclaw_legacy runs on every openclaw dispatch.
